allPosts.title: Restless
allPosts.excerpt: Always-on anti-malware software using malicious language processing (hierarchical attention network).

allPosts.title: AI Photobooth
allPosts.excerpt: A project created for Edelman as part of their AI initiative, where users can take selfies and transform them into various styles from film / television, using a convolutional neural network (CNN) and neural style transfer.

allPosts.title: Text RPG Engine
allPosts.excerpt: A library written in ES6 JavaScript to create text adventures / interactive fiction games with flexible custom player interactions.

allPosts.title: Dementia classifier convolutional neural network built with transfer learning
allPosts.excerpt: Convolutional neural network (CNN) from transfer learning to detect varying levls of dementia in MRI scans.

allPosts.title: Frame
allPosts.excerpt: Journaling application in electron (web / desktop) that summarizes and extracts important data with nautral language processing, and can answer questions asked to it.

allPosts.title: Dreamgazer
allPosts.excerpt: Wearable lucid dreaming device made with an Arduino, a pulse sensor, and an EEG sensor (NeuroSky MindWave), with Processing code to record / visualize dreams; expanded into a 3D printable brain-computer interface template with VR capabilities and an interface built in Unity.

allPosts.title: Emote / Emoter
allPosts.excerpt: Chatbot library that understands intentions through emotions, with machine learning-powered sentiment analysis REST API; also created digital personality of myself by parsing 70,000 Facebook messages.

allPosts.title: Conversation starter garment
allPosts.excerpt: A fiber-optics interactive garment promoting social conversation with ambient lights.

allPosts.title: Full-Sight Jacket
allPosts.excerpt: Garment with motion detection sensors and LED lights to alert you to objects that pass in your vicinity from behind.

allPosts.title: Stopwatch
allPosts.excerpt: Web app built with the Affectiva API that automatically curates YouTube content based on detected emotions (through computer vision)

allPosts.title: A Pipboy
allPosts.excerpt: A functional reimagining of the Pipboy from the Fallout games.

allPosts.title: Jasper 2.0 - Amazon Echo alternative with chatbot
allPosts.excerpt: Homemade robot using Jasper library to create a virtual assistant that can converse naturally through crowd-sourced messages (Cleverbot)

allPosts.title: Solitary
allPosts.excerpt: An audio-visual experience abstractifying solitary confinement.

allPosts.title: Sonance
allPosts.excerpt: virtual noise cancellation through ASMR-based soundscapes

allPosts.title: Virtual blindness game
allPosts.excerpt: Fully playable prototype of a game fully accessible for the blind, with the core concept stimulating blindness. Uses a virtual sonar system built with raycasting and spatial sound.
